scope.target: Move or archive low-risk non-generic files based on classification results.
scope.dependency_radius: AI assets, standards, guides, and indexes.
constraints: Use sub-agent or low-cost worker for pure file movement when helpful.
Run stale reference search after moves.
non_goals: Do not move high-risk files without reference plan.

inputs.architecture_target: Cleaner universal versus non-universal file placement.

steps: Move low-risk files in small batches.
validation: Run rg for stale old paths.
